title: M&E Engineer
description:
M&E Engineer


Job Description & Requirements


The MEP Engineer is responsible for all aspects of mechanical and electrical engineering activities, processes, and construction of projects.

· Monitor and report on the progress of work to project manager;

· Control the progress of RFA, RFI, Shop Drawings, Technical Submissions and Equipment/Material Procurement/Fabrication/Delivery Status for on-time completion.

· Coordinate with client’s representatives, consultants, and subcontractors on all technical matters, including submission of method statement, drawings, materials, samples and work progress;

· Control site progress & installation quality as per approved Shop Drawings, Technical Submissions and Equipment/Material Procurement/Fabrication/Delivery Schedule for on-time completion.

· Carry out inspection of MEP works prior to concreting or subsequent construction works;

· Assist in supervising and coordinating MEP services work closely with other departments;

· Assist for submission of evaluation of progress claim, variation work to M&E Manager

· Participate in all relevant project review meetings, site meetings, design meetings, and other project relevant meetings;

· Responsible for carrying out M&E technical meetings and resolving technical issues with record.

· Responsible for M&E drawing coordination and production of CSD and individual service drawings quality.

· Provide and maintain all site inspection records & T&C records up to date.

· Ensure quality of MEP workmanship and compliance with safety and environmental requirements

· Provide and maintain all site inspection records & T&C records up to date.



Requirements:

· Degree in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, recognized by PE Board Singapore;

· Minimum 3 years’ work experience related projects in Singapore building and construction industry;

· Electrical/Mechanical Engineering experience in HDB projects or high-rise developments;

· Possess strong Electrical/Mechanical knowledge with hands-on experiences;

· Strong communication skills with the ability to coordinate with site teams to execute work



Suitable candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button or email to Career@kah.com.sg

Only shortlisted applicants will be notified.

KUAN AIK HONG CONSTRUCTION PTE LTD

 

is an A1 main contractor involving in various public and private project. Such as residential projects HDB projects (BTO, LUP, HIP) as well as institutional MOE schools projects such as Indoor Sports Hall , Teaching blocks and etc.
